titleStmt.title: SII 34.273: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 273. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Tribhuvanavīradēva (Kulōttuṅga III), 40th year, Karkaṭaka, 3 = A.D. 1218.

The nāṭṭār of Valla-nāḍu met in the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār and decided unanimously that they should protect all the kuḍimakkaḷ in the temple (dēvadāna) villages, should not harass them by forcefully taking their cattle, etc. All the communities there—Śivabrāhmaṇas, Cheṭṭi, Veḷḷāḷa, kaikkōḷa, dēvaraḍiyār, kaṇmāḷa, herders—were permitted to enjoy the land they had purchased from the nāṭṭār as kuḍi-nīṅgā-dēvadāna and pay the stipulated dues in grain and money to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyu mīḻamuṅ karuvūru pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyu
ṅ koṇṭu maturaiyil vīrar Avijekam vicaiyar Aviṣēkamum paṇṇiyaru[ḷiya ]
puvaṉavīradevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 nāṟpatāvatu Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu [ va
kūrappāttāḻvu] tēvi maṅkalattu nāṭā Icainta nāṭṭōmeṅkaḷi licaintu Uṭaiyār ti
ruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruppati tēvun tirumuṭaiyāṉ tirumaṇṭapattu nāṭāy
kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu mūṉṟān tiyati nāḷ Icaivu tīṭṭumiṭṭu kalveṭṭi
kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tiruppatiyil nāluvarattukkuḷḷu Irunta kuṭimakkaḷai nō
kkuvōmākavu puṟattēvatāṉaṅkaḷaiyuṅ kuṭimakkaḷaiyu nōkkuvōmākavum nōkkumiṭattu paṟittal kaṉṟu
kāli piṭittal maṟṟuñ cila citampukaḷ ceytāruṇṭākil nīr nilattilē Iraṇṭu mācceyyun tirucūlakkal nā
ṭṭi kuṭuttu paṟicciṉa piṭiciṉa viṭuvōmākavum Ittiruppatiyil civappirāmaṇar ceṭṭikaḷ veḷḷā
ḷār kaikkōḷar tēvarraṭiyār kaṇmāḷar Iṭaiyar maṟṟun Ittiruppatiyi Iruntu
var cilar Eṅkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nīrnilaṅkaḷum puṉcaikaḷu kuṭi nīṅkātēva
tāṉamāka Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉāṟku Iṟai Iṟupparākavum Iṟukkumiṭattu nīr nilat tukku māttāl pa
tiṉ kalanē tūṇippatakkāka vanta nellum puṉcaikku māttāl patiṉaiñcē
tikācum koḷḷakkaṭavatākavu Ippaṭiyāl vanta nelluṅ kācum cantirāttayaval
Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kuṭi nīṅkāt tēvatāṉamāy Iṟai Iṟuppatā
ka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭut(tē)tom valla nāṭṭu nāṭā Icainta nāṭ
ṭōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Innilaṅkaḷuṭaiya kuṭimakkaḷukku
Oru Iṭaiñcal vakkutal veṇṭila rāyaṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
